meaning: 无锡[江苏省](旧译Wusih 或 Wuhsi)
examples: Xiang Chenxi is a beautiful girl from Wuxi, Jiangsu Province.
Wuxi opera is part of the local culture and it has a lasting value.
Wuxi is famous for its water but it once had trouble because of water.
The China Daily newspaper said authorities in the eastern city of Wuxi were looking into the claims.
Ambitions at another government-sponsored zone in Wuxi (like Suzhou, in Jiangsu province) are likely to be scaled back.
